difficulty.reason: Perennial, vigorous grower, large sweet fruit with minimal care

growth_stages.name: Dormant
growth_stages.look_for: Brown/dry leaves from winter, small green buds at crown

growth_stages.name: Spring Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Fresh green leaves uncurling from the center

prompt.en: Pull off the old brown leaves so new ones can grow!
prompt.da: Traek de gamle brune blade af, saa nye kan vokse!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: White flowers with yellow centers, larger than Ostara flowers

prompt.en: Korona has BIGGER flowers than Ostara! Can you see the difference?
prompt.da: Korona har STOERRE blomster end Ostara! Kan du se forskel?

growth_stages.name: Fruiting
growth_stages.look_for: Large red berries, bigger than Ostara berries

prompt.en: Korona berries are HUGE! Pick the red ones -- are they bigger than Ostara's?
prompt.da: Korona-baer er KAEMPE! Pluk de roede -- er de stoerre end Ostaras?

human_readable.en: Keep soil moist, not soggy. Water every 2-3 days in summer.
human_readable.da: Hold jorden fugtig, ikke gennembloedt. Vand hver 2-3 dag om sommeren.

harvest.notes: June-bearing: one big harvest flush in June-July. Larger fruit than Ostara but shorter season.

companion_plants.notes: Same companions as Ostara. Keep away from raspberries (verticillium wilt).

message.en: Strawberries in {bed} need water -- soil is too dry!
message.da: Jordbaer i {bed} har brug for vand -- jorden er for toer!

message.en: Frost warning for strawberries! Cover with fleece tonight.
message.da: Frostadvarsel for jordbaer! Daek med fiberdug i aften.
